no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: The bead-specific scale fixture spec passed and emitted baseline measurements, but the required full-suite gate `bun run test:e2e` is still red in this worktree on unrelated existing failures. The observed blockers include failing specs in `app.spec.ts`, `documents.spec.ts`, `navigation.spec.ts`, `screenshots.spec.ts`, and `sessions.spec.ts`, plus repeated GraphQL resolver panics from `cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver.go:213` (`DocStale` panics `not implemented`). `lefthook run pre-commit` passed, and the scale test logged baseline values to `.ddx/executions/20260506T043749-7c9fea7a/perf-baseline.md`, but the suite is not green so this bead cannot be closed without addressing those unrelated failures first.
